summary: P0 ALIVE INDICATORS FEATURE COMPLETE - All backend endpoints and frontend UI components verified working. /api/health returns all required P0 fields (autonomous_enabled, strategy_loop_last_tick_at, strategy_loop_ticks_total, discovery_loop_last_tick_at, discovery_loop_ticks_total, uptime_sec, db_ping, ws_connections). /api/autonomous/metrics returns all P0 fields. Frontend AutonomousDashboard shows ENGINE: RUNNING banner, Last tick countdown, Markets scanned, Open markets badge, and WhyNotTradingCard with filter reasons.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/health endpoint returns all 8 P0 required fields correctly (autonomous_enabled, strategy_loop_last_tick_at, strategy_loop_ticks_total, discovery_loop_last_tick_at, discovery_loop_ticks_total, uptime_sec, db_ping, ws_connections)

/api/autonomous/metrics returns all 7 P0 required fields correctly (events_scanned_last_min, markets_scanned_last_min, events_next_24h_count, markets_next_24h_count, open_markets_found_last_min, next_open_market_eta, filtered_out_reason_counts)
POST /api/autonomous/enable correctly starts the 2-loop scheduler (Discovery 30s, Trading 3s)
EngineStatusBanner correctly displays ENGINE: RUNNING with green indicator when enabled, ENGINE: STOPPED with red when disabled
Last tick countdown updates in real-time (verified 0s ago during testing)
Markets scanned count (27829) and Open markets badge (5588) correctly displayed
Filter Transparency card shows 3% pass rate with breakdown of filtered reasons
Scheduler Heartbeat shows both Discovery Loop (ALIVE) and Trading Loop (ACTIVE) status
seed_data_creation: None - using real Kalshi basketball data ingestion
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Alive Indicators feature complete. All endpoints verified: GET /api/health (8 P0 fields), GET /api/autonomous/metrics (7 P0 fields), POST /api/autonomous/enable (starts 2-loop scheduler), POST /api/autonomous/disable. Frontend verified: EngineStatusBanner (ENGINE: RUNNING/STOPPED), Last tick countdown, Markets scanned count, Open markets badge, WhyNotTradingCard with filter reasons. Scheduler runs Discovery Loop at 30s intervals and Trading Loop at 3s intervals when markets are open.

/api/health.autonomous_enabled: VERIFIED - boolean, true when scheduler running

EngineStatusBanner.running_state: VERIFIED - Shows 'ENGINE: RUNNING' with green indicator and checkmark
EngineStatusBanner.stopped_state: VERIFIED - Shows 'ENGINE: STOPPED' with red indicator
EngineStatusBanner.last_tick_countdown: VERIFIED - Shows 'Last tick: Xs ago' updating in real-time
EngineStatusBanner.open_markets_badge: VERIFIED - Shows green badge with count (5588)

WhyNotTradingCard.active_trading: VERIFIED - Shows 'Actively evaluating X open markets' when markets open
WhyNotTradingCard.filter_reasons: VERIFIED - Shows filter reason breakdown when markets filtered
WhyNotTradingCard.no_markets: VERIFIED - Shows appropriate message when no markets open

SchedulerHeartbeat.discovery_loop: VERIFIED - Shows ALIVE status, last tick, total, rate/min
SchedulerHeartbeat.trading_loop: VERIFIED - Shows ACTIVE/STOPPED status based on open markets

mocked_apis_list: KalshiAdapterSandbox - simulation mode for paper trading
mocked_apis.real_data: Kalshi basketball data ingestion uses real API to populate events/markets in DB
